features.name: $writememb system task on unpacked memory array
features.description: Code should include $writememb used to dump an unpacked memory array to a file in binary format, exercising the binary memory write system task

features.name: $writememh system task on unpacked memory array
features.description: Code should include $writememh used to dump an unpacked memory array to a file in hexadecimal format, exercising the hex memory write system task

features.name: $readmemb and $writememb roundtrip on memory array
features.description: Code should include a $readmemb followed by $writememb on the same unpacked memory array to verify binary memory file read/write roundtrip behaviour
